name: six2eight/project-steps
title: Six2eight Project Steps
description: Vertical process timeline with accent and main headings.

default.title: Surface Preparation
default.description: We begin by deep-cleaning the surface to remove contaminants and ensure a strong bond.

default.title: Surface Readiness
default.description: Once prepped, we assess and refine the surface so it is ready for the coating system.

default.title: System Application
default.description: A specialized primer is applied, followed by the topcoat layers to specification.

default.title: Cure & Set
default.description: Unlike traditional systems, this process cures efficiently so you can return to use sooner.
